hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git commit' || exit 0; changed=$(git -C /home/rno/git/Collectoria diff --name-only HEAD~1 HEAD 2>/dev/null); echo "$changed" | grep -qE '^(Backend|backend|Frontend|frontend)/' || exit 0; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"[Hook Security] Ce commit touche du code Backend/Frontend. Alfred doit déclencher l Agent Security pour auditer les changements du dernier commit."}}';

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git commit' || exit 0; count=$(git -C /home/rno/git/Collectoria rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null); [ "$count" -gt 0 ] && [ $((count % 10)) -eq 0 ] || exit 0; echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"[Hook Amélioration Continue] $count commits atteints. Alfred doit déclencher l Agent Amélioration Continue pour un audit du système d agents.\"}}"
